body:
This pull request updates the documentation for the `Microphysics2M` module to improve clarity, correctness, and mathematical rigor. The changes include refining variable definitions, improving the descriptions of size distributions, and adding detailed explanations for parameter calculations and limiting procedures.

### Improvements to size distribution descriptions:
* Expanded the description of cloud droplet and raindrop size distributions, introducing generalized gamma and exponential distributions, respectively. Added detailed derivations for free parameters such as `A_c`, `B_c`, `N_0`, and `λ_r`. [[1]](diffhunk://#diff-e795656c4572263288e2bb0cdb081b6f4de23ed7a2a0ad3167ac28a6e199efd1L18-R23) [[2]](diffhunk://#diff-e795656c4572263288e2bb0cdb081b6f4de23ed7a2a0ad3167ac28a6e199efd1L31-R220)
* Added a detailed explanation of the change of variables between mass-based and diameter-based distributions, including the transformation of integration bounds and differential elements.

### Enhancements to parameter limiting procedures:
* Documented the limiting procedures for raindrop size distribution parameters (`λ_r`, `N_0`, and `\bar{x}_r`) to prevent numerical artifacts in simulations, including step-by-step derivations.

* define coefficients as length scales instead of inverse length scales
* Make use of quantiles for distribution bounds for integration
* Reference equations to SB2006 where appropriate
* Update struct names for rain particle pdf options

title: Refactor 2M SB2006 scheme
